decisions.title: Turn Team Messages Into Typed Protocols
decisions.description: Requests like plan approval or shutdown are tracked with request ids and explicit response states. This turns loose chat into process the harness can reason about.
decisions.alternatives: Free-form text messages are enough for a toy demo, but they make it hard to distinguish requests from normal discussion.

zh.title: 把团队消息升级成类型化协议
zh.description: 计划审批、关闭请求这类动作都带 request id 和状态流转，协作消息不再只是松散聊天，而是可推理流程。

ja.title: チームメッセージを型付きプロトコルにする
ja.description: 計画承認や終了要求は request id と状態遷移で管理し、単なる雑談ではなくハーネスが理解できるプロセスにします。

decisions.title: Track The Lifecycle Of Each Coordination Request
decisions.description: A request is not done when it is sent. The runtime needs to remember whether it is pending, approved, rejected, or already consumed.
decisions.alternatives: Stateless requests reduce code, but they make retries, timeouts, and debugging much harder.

zh.title: 跟踪每个协调请求的生命周期
zh.description: 请求不是发出去就结束了，运行时还需要知道它是 pending、approved、rejected 还是已消费。

ja.title: 協調リクエストごとのライフサイクルを追跡する
ja.description: 要求は送った瞬間に終わりません。pending、approved、rejected、consumed を追跡する必要があります。
